meanings.definition: the process whereby a protein molecule assumes its intricate three-dimensional shape
examples: understanding protein folding is the next step in deciphering the genetic code

meanings.definition: a geological process that causes a bend in a stratum of rock

examples: he gave the napkins a double fold

meanings.definition: bend or lay so that one part covers the other
incorporate a food ingredient into a mixture by repeatedly turning it over without stirring or beating
examples: Fold the egg whites into the batter

meanings.definition: cease to operate or cause to cease operating
examples: The owners decided to move and to close the factory
My business closes every night at 8 P.M.

meanings.definition: confine in a fold, like sheep

examples: The bed folds in a jiffy

meanings.definition: capable of being folded up and stored
